== Notes for [[Item:Q106255|Q106255]] ==

From ''Banu Taym'' Tribe (Part of ''Banu Quraysh'' Tribe).

* Wilaadat (Birth):
* Wafaat (Death):

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Farwah_bint_al-Qasim
--------------------
Umm Farwah bint al-Qasim (Arabic: أم فروة بنت القاسم‎) or Umm Farwah Fatimah was the wife Muhammad al-Baqir, and the mother of the sixth Imam, Ja'far al-Sadiq.

Her father was Al-Qasim ibn Muhammad ibn Abi Bakr. Her grandfather was Muhammad ibn Abi Bakr. She also had another son called Abdullah son of Muhammad al-Baqir.

She is a notable woman for her knowledge in Islamic history. She is among the Imamiyyat (the women of the Ahl al-Bayt and the companions of the Imams) narrators of the hadith and narrated on the authority of Imam Zayn al-Abidin.

http://bit.ly/1Mxa1xY
--------------------
She was the great-grand daughter of Abu Bakr Siddique, the first caliph of Islam.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000001473080006

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
